snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe рЯСЙ https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander. 

Music Credits:
Aaya Sher
Album / Movie : The Paradise 
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Kasarla Shyam 
Vocals - Addula Jangireddy, Arjun Chandy

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboards, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Trumpet & Flugelhorn - Rakesh MS
Chorus Arranged & Sung by Arjun Chandy
Backing Vocals - Akunoori Devaihah, Yogi Sekar, Sridhar Sena
Rhythm Produced by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Karthik Vamsi, Shashank Vijay
Orchestrals Programmed by IC, Dan Kriston
Additional Music Programmed By Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya
Session Assistant - Shivakiran

Recorded at
Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai
Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B


Movie Credits:
Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:
Writer - Director: Srikanth Odela
Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Chief Co-Director & Additional Screenplay: Vinay Sagar Jonnala
Co-Director: Hari K Chanduri
Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)
Dialect & Diction: Krishna Teja 
Costume Designer: Ajay Kumar J
Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah
Vfx Supervisor: Naresh Yalla
Titles: Hari Krishna Y
Direction Team: Gajjala Bhaskar Reddy , Nagaraju Bramhaiha , Yashwanth Vittapu ,Madhu Sugreevu, Billakurthi, Venkata Aarush , Bhaskar Ponaboina , Uday Swaroop Kalahasti , Sai Kiran Modem , Hosakota Vamshi Krishna , Jasti Guhan Chowdary , Chaitthu Mothkuri .
Color By: Redchillies.Color
Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker
Stills: Sridhar Chadalawada
Pro: Vamsi-Sekhar
Marketing: First Show
Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti 
Executive Producer: Abinav Waddypally
Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

snippet.title: Band Melam Official Teaser | Harsh Roshan | Sridevi | Kona Venkat | Sathish Javvaji | Vijai Bulganin
snippet.description:
HereвАЩs the Official Teaser of Band Melam Movie on Aditya Music. 

#BandMelamTeaser #BandMelam #HarshRoshan #Sridevi #SathishJavvaji #VijaiBulganin

Thippukuntannav Lyrical Video вЦЇ https://youtu.be/5rsgBCPT8dc 

Enjoy more Videos from Band Melam вЦЇ https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0ZpYcTg19EGn4iSiNlJ2IIDMprFh0kUU

Band Melam is an Upcoming Latest Telugu Movie Starring Harsh Roshan, Sridevi, Sai Kumar & Others. Written & Directed by Sathish Javvaji. Music by Vijai Bulganin. Cinematography by Satish Mutyala. Produced by Kavya & Shravya under Kona Film Corporation. A Kona Venkat Production. Presented by Mango Mass Media.
 
In Cinemas Worldwide from March 13th, 2026.
 
Cast & Crew Details:
 
Cast: Harsh Roshan, Sridevi, Sai Kumar & Others.
 
Technical Crew:
A Kona Venkat Production
Banner: Kona Film Corporation
Presented by Mango Mass Media
Producers: Kavya & Shravya
Co-Producer: Sivaraju Pranav
Writer & Director: Sathish Javvaji
Music: Vijai Bulganin
Screenplay and Editing: Siva Mupparaju
DOP: Satish Mutyala
Lyricist: Chadrabose 
Art Director: Narni Srinivas
Costume designer: Nandhana Gayathri
VFX: GRAVITY
Marketing: Whacked Out Media

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Trailer | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh, Saurabh Shukla
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages вАУ including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal вАУ The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime VideoвАЩs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures вАУ Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#subedaar #SubedaarOnPrime #anilkapoor #trailer #officialtrailer #movie #primevideoindia

snippet.description:
Welcome to WELTIFY PRO CLASH SEASON 2 (WPCS2) вАФ one of IndiaвАЩs biggest competitive BGMI esports tournaments.

рЯПЖ STAGE: Semi Finals вАУ Decider Day
рЯУЕ DATE: 25th February 2026
вП∞ TIME: 5:00 PM onwards
рЯУН FORMAT: Online

MATCH MAP ORDER
рЯФє A x B Erangel
рЯФєA x B Miramar
рЯФєA x C Erangel
рЯФєA x C Miramar
рЯФєB x C Erangel
рЯФєB x C Miramar

GROUP A
Hero Xtreme GodLike, Victores Sumus, NoNx Esports, Vasista Esports, Welt Esports, White Walkers, Team Alpha, Riotnationz
GROUP B
iQOO Revenant X Spark, iQOO 8Bit, Genesis Esports, Team LEFP, Vanguard Esports, LHS Esports, EMZ Esports, Myth Esports
GROUP C
iQOO Orangutan, OnePlus Gods Reign, Meta Ninza, 4TR Official, Rising Esports, Team H4K, AutoBotz Esports, Gods 4 Reason

Welt Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

Specializing in titles such as Bgmi,Clash Royale,Free Fire,Valorant and Fortnite, our teams are known for their tactical precision, relentless grind, and dynamic playstyles. We focus not only on winning, but on creating a culture where players can thriveвАФboth in and out of the game.

Welt Esports is more than just a team; it's a movement. Our organization is built on the belief that esports is a legitimate and powerful force in entertainment, capable of inspiring, connecting, and pushing boundaries. We support our players with elite coaching, mental performance resources, and cutting-edge training environments.

Whether weвАЩre lighting up the main stage or growing our fanbase online, Welt Esports stands for passion, perseverance, and performance. As we continue to rise, we invite gamers, fans, and partners to be a part of our journeyвАФto create, compete, and conquer together under one banner: Welt.

#Thrist For Gamers! 
#getweltified

а∞И а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞ѓа±Жа∞Ха±На∞Х а∞≠а∞Ња∞µа∞В а∞™а±Ба∞®а∞∞а±На∞µа∞ња∞Х а∞Ча∞Ња∞∞а±Б а∞§а∞Ва∞°а±На∞∞а∞њ а∞Єа±Ба∞∞а±За∞Ја±Н а∞Ча∞Ња∞∞а±Б а∞Жа∞µа±За∞¶а∞®а∞®а∞њ а∞§а∞≤а±Ба∞Ъа±Ба∞Ха±Ба∞Ва∞Яа±В а∞Ка∞єа∞ња∞Ва∞Ъа∞њ а∞Ъа±За∞Єа∞ња∞® а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞За∞¶а∞њ.

а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞Ѓа±Ба∞Ва∞¶а±З а∞Яа±На∞∞а∞Ња∞µа∞ња∞≤а∞ња∞Ва∞Ча±Н а∞Ьа∞Ча∞¶а±Аа∞Ја±Н а∞ђа±На∞∞а∞¶а∞∞а±Н а∞Ха∞њ а∞™а±Ба∞®а∞∞а±На∞µа∞ња∞Х а∞Ча∞Ња∞∞а±Б а∞§а∞Ва∞°а±На∞∞а∞њ а∞Жа∞ѓа∞®а∞Ва∞Яа∞њ а∞µа∞Ва∞Яа∞њ а∞Єа±Ба∞∞а±За∞Ја±Н а∞Ча∞Ња∞∞а∞ња∞Ха∞њ а∞µа∞ња∞®а∞ња∞™а∞ња∞Ва∞Ъа∞њ а∞И а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞За∞≤а∞Њ а∞Еа∞®а±Ба∞Ха±Ба∞Ва∞Яа±Ба∞®а±На∞® а∞Ъа±За∞ѓа∞Ѓа∞Ва∞Яа∞∞ а∞Еа∞®а∞њ а∞Еа∞°а∞ња∞Ча∞ња∞® а∞§а∞∞а±Ба∞µа∞Ња∞§а±З а∞З а∞µа±Аа∞°а∞ња∞ѓа±Л а∞≤а±Л а∞Ха±Ка∞®а±На∞®а∞њ а∞Єа±Аа∞®а±На∞Єа±Н а∞§а±Аа∞ѓа∞°а∞В а∞Ьа∞∞а∞ња∞Ча∞ња∞Ва∞¶а∞њ. 

а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞µа∞≤а±На∞≤ а∞Е а∞™а∞ња∞≤а±На∞≤а∞Ха∞њ а∞Оа∞Ва∞§а±Л а∞Ха±Ка∞Ва∞§ а∞®а±На∞ѓа∞Ња∞ѓа∞В а∞Ьа∞∞а±Ба∞Ча±Ба∞§а±Ба∞Ва∞¶а∞њ а∞Еа∞®а∞њ. а∞Жа∞∞а±На∞•а∞ња∞Ха∞Ва∞Ча∞Њ а∞Оа∞Ва∞§а±Л а∞Ха±Ка∞Ва∞§ а∞єа±Жа∞≤а±На∞™а±Н а∞Еа∞µа±Ба∞§а±Ба∞Ва∞¶а∞њ а∞Еа∞®а∞њ. 
а∞Йа∞®а±На∞® а∞Ъа∞Ња∞≤а∞Њ а∞§а∞Ха±На∞Ха±Ба∞µ а∞Яа±Иа∞В а∞≤а±Л а∞Ха∞Ва∞Ча∞∞а±Б а∞Ха∞Ва∞Ча∞∞а±Б а∞Ча∞Њ а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞Ъа±За∞ґа∞Њ. а∞Оа∞Яа±Ба∞µа∞Ва∞Яа∞њ а∞≤а±Ла∞™а∞Ња∞≤а±Б а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞≤а±Л а∞Ъа±Ва∞°а∞Ха∞Ва∞°а∞њ.рЯЩП

а∞®а∞Ња∞µа∞Ва∞§а±Б а∞Ча∞Њ вВє10,000 а∞∞а±Ва∞™а∞Ња∞ѓа∞≤а±Б а∞Єа∞єа∞Ња∞ѓа∞В а∞Ъа±За∞ґа∞Ња∞®а±Б. а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞Ха∞њ а∞™а±Жа∞Яа±На∞Яа∞ња∞® а∞Еа∞Ѓа±Ма∞Ва∞Яа±Н а∞Ѓа±Аа∞Ха±Б а∞Ъа±Жа∞™а±На∞™а∞Ња∞≤а∞њ а∞Еа∞®а±Ба∞Ха±Ла∞µа∞Яа±На∞≤а±За∞¶а±Б. а∞Еа∞≤а∞Ња∞Ча±З а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Яа∞Ха∞њ а∞µа∞Ъа±На∞Ъа∞ња∞® а∞™а±На∞∞а∞§а∞њ а∞Та∞Ха±На∞Х а∞∞а±Ва∞™а∞Ња∞ѓа∞њ а∞Е а∞™а∞Ња∞™а∞Ха∞њ а∞За∞Ъа±На∞Ъа±За∞ѓа∞Ња∞≤а∞®а∞њ а∞®а∞ња∞∞а±На∞£а∞ѓа∞ња∞Ва∞Ъа±Ба∞Ха±Ба∞®а±На∞®а∞Ња∞®а±Б. 

а∞®а∞Њ а∞И а∞™а±На∞∞а∞ѓа∞§а±На∞®а∞В а∞Ж а∞™а∞Ња∞™а∞Ха∞њ а∞И а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞¶а±На∞µа∞Ња∞∞а∞Њ а∞Оа∞Ва∞§а±Л а∞Єа∞єа∞Ња∞ѓа∞В а∞Еа∞Ва∞¶а∞Ња∞≤а∞®а∞њ а∞Жа∞ґа∞ња∞Єа±На∞§а±В.... 
а∞Ж а∞™а∞Ња∞™ а∞§а±На∞µа∞∞а∞Ча∞Њ а∞Ха±Ла∞≤а±Ба∞Ха±Ла∞µа∞Ња∞≤а∞®а∞њ а∞Ха±Ла∞∞а±Ба∞Ха±Ба∞Ва∞Яа±Ба∞®а±На∞®а∞Ња∞®а±Б. а∞≤а±Иа∞Ха±На∞Єа±Н а∞Ха∞Ња∞Ѓа±Жа∞Ва∞Яа±На∞Єа±Н а∞И а∞™а∞Ња∞Яа∞Ха±Б а∞Еа∞µа∞Єа∞∞а∞В а∞≤а±За∞¶а±Б. а∞Ја±За∞∞а±Н а∞Ъа±За∞Єа∞њ а∞За∞Ва∞Ха±Жа∞Ва∞§а±Л а∞Е а∞Ха±Ба∞Яа±Ба∞Ва∞ђа∞Ња∞®а∞ња∞Ха∞њ а∞Ѓа∞¶а±На∞¶а∞§а±Ба∞Ча∞Њ а∞Ѓа∞®а∞Ѓа∞Ва∞¶а∞∞а∞В а∞®а∞ња∞≤а±Ба∞¶а±На∞¶а∞Ња∞В. 

а∞За∞Яа±На∞≤а±Б а∞Ѓа±А а∞™а±На∞∞а±За∞Ѓа∞§а±Л а∞™а∞≤а±На∞Єа∞∞а±Н а∞ђа±Иа∞Ха±Н а∞∞а∞Ѓа∞£.

а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞Ѓа±Ба∞Ва∞¶а±З а∞Яа±На∞∞а∞Ња∞µа∞ња∞≤а∞ња∞Ва∞Ча±Н а∞Ьа∞Ча∞¶а±Аа∞Ја±Н а∞ђа±На∞∞а∞¶а∞∞а±Н а∞Ха∞њ а∞™а±Ба∞®а∞∞а±На∞µа∞ња∞Х а∞Ча∞Ња∞∞а±Б а∞§а∞Ва∞°а±На∞∞а∞њ а∞Жа∞ѓа∞®а∞Ва∞Яа∞њ а∞µа∞Ва∞Яа∞њ а∞Єа±Ба∞∞а±За∞Ја±Н а∞Ча∞Ња∞∞а∞ња∞Ха∞њ а∞µа∞ња∞®а∞ња∞™а∞ња∞Ва∞Ъа∞њ а∞И а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞За∞≤а∞Њ а∞Еа∞®а±Ба∞Ха±Ба∞Ва∞Яа±Ба∞®а±На∞® а∞Ъа±За∞ѓа∞Ѓа∞Ва∞Яа∞∞ а∞Еа∞®а∞њ а∞Еа∞°а∞ња∞Ча∞ња∞® а∞§а∞∞а±Ба∞µа∞Ња∞§а±З а∞З а∞µа±Аа∞°а∞ња∞ѓа±Л а∞≤а±Л а∞Ха±Ка∞®а±На∞®а∞њ а∞Єа±Аа∞®а±На∞Єа±Н а∞§а±Аа∞ѓа∞°а∞В а∞Ьа∞∞а∞ња∞Ча∞ња∞Ва∞¶а∞њ. 

а∞З а∞™а∞Ња∞Я а∞µа∞≤а±На∞≤ а∞Е а∞™а∞ња∞≤а±На∞≤а∞Ха∞њ а∞Оа∞Ва∞§а±Л а∞Ха±Ка∞Ва∞§ а∞®а±На∞ѓа∞Ња∞ѓа∞В а∞Ьа∞∞а±Ба∞Ча±Ба∞§а±Ба∞Ва∞¶а∞њ а∞Еа∞®а∞њ. а∞Жа∞∞а±На∞•а∞ња∞Ха∞Ва∞Ча∞Њ а∞Оа∞Ва∞§а±Л а∞Ха±Ка∞Ва∞§ а∞єа±Жа∞≤а±На∞™а±Н а∞Еа∞µа±Ба∞§а±Ба∞Ва∞¶а∞њ а∞Еа∞®а∞њ.

snippet.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Trailer) | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready to fall in love all over again! Speed Records presents the trailer for the most-awaited Punjabi love story of 2026- "Ishqa'n De Lekhe".

Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bhullar returns with yet another masterpiece вАФ and this one is nothing short of magical. This new Punjabi movie is the story that speaks the language of love & is destined to become an evergreen classic of Punjabi cinema.

Mark your calendars. Book your seats. рЯЧУпЄП Releasing in cinemas on 6th March 2026

This new Punjabi movie is the story that speaks the language of love & is destined to become an evergreen classic of Punjabi cinema.

Mark your calendars. Book your seats. рЯЧУпЄП Releasing in cinemas on 6th March 2026

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat II | Official Trailer II
snippet.description:
The wait is almost over! Mortal Kombat II arrives in theaters and IMAX May 8. #MortalKombatMovie #FilmedForIMAX

From New Line Cinema comes the latest high-stakes installment in the blockbuster video game franchise in all its brutal glory, Mortal Kombat II. This time, the fan favorite championsвАФnow joined by Johnny Cage himselfвАФare pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

Karl Urban stars as Johnny Cage, alongside Adeline Rudolph, Jessica McNamee, Josh Lawson, Ludi Lin, Mehcad Brooks, Tati Gabrielle, Lewis Tan, Damon Herriman, with Chin Han, Tadanobu Asano as Lord Raiden, Joe Taslim as Bi-Han, and Hiroyuki Sanada as Hanzo Hasashi and Scorpion.

Director Simon McQuoid returns to helm the follow up to his explosive 2021cinematic adventure, from a screenplay by Jeremy Slater, based on the videogame created by Ed Boon and John Tobias. The film is produced by Todd Garner, E. Bennett Walsh, James Wan, Toby Emmerich and Simon McQuoid, and executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Jeremy Slater, Ed Boon and Lawrence Kasanoff.

Joining McQuoid behind the camera are director of photography Stephen F. Windon, production designer Yohei Taneda, editor Stuart Levy and costume designer Cappi Ireland, with casting by Rich Delia and music by Benjamin Wallfisch. 

New Line Cinema Presents an Atomic Monster/Broken Road Production, a Fireside Films Production, Mortal Kombat II. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX¬Ѓ across North America on May 8, 2026, and internationally beginning 6 May 2026.

snippet.title: The Mummy Returns - Official 25th Anniversary Trailer (2026) Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz
snippet.description:
Check out The Mummy Returns 25th anniversary trailer for the upcoming theatrical re-release of the sequel to the 1999 action film, The Mummy. The Mummy Returns stars Brendan Fraser (as Rick OвАЩConnell) and Rachel Weisz (as Evelyn). 

Set 10 years after the events of the first film, The Mummy Returns picks up in 1933 with the swashbuckling heroes now married and living in London. Parents to eight-year-old Alex (Freddie Boath), the couple brings the boy along to their Egyptian expeditions, where they inadvertently uncover a rare artifact, the Bracelet of Anubis. The piece once belonged to a fearsome warrior known as the Scorpion King (Dwayne Johnson in his feature film debut) and can be used to command his army of jackal-like fighters. 

Back in London, trouble begins after the bracelet locks onto AlexвАЩs wrist, just as a cult planning to resurrect the powerful mummy Imhotep (Arnold Vosloo), kidnaps Evelyn. Suddenly, father and son are forced to undertake a dangerous rescue mission alongside EvelynвАЩs spoiled brother (John Hannah), one that pits them against Meela Nais (Patricia Velasquez). The physical reincarnation of ImhotepвАЩs ancient lover, she hopes Imhotep will defeat the Scorpion King in battle, thereby conquering the world.

Dodging all manner of unimaginable threatsвАФdeath-defying chases, merciless hand-to-hand combat, even ritual sacrificeвАФthe OвАЩConnell family bravely fights to save the globe, and one another, from certain destruction.

The Mummy Returns, directed by Stephen Sommers, returns to US theaters on March 27, 2026 for a very special limited engagement.

#TheMummyReturns #Movies #IGN

A Tale of Tenali Ramakrishna: -
______________________________________
The Witty Poet of Krishna DevarayaвАЩs Court, Blessed by Goddess Kali, Tenali Rama earned the title "Vikatakavi" (The Witty Poet) for his sharp intellect. Despite personal struggles, he rose to become the esteemed Aasthana Kavi (Court Poet) of Emperor Krishna Devaraya. With clever solutions to complex problems, he won the kingdomвАЩs admiration, leaving a lasting legacy as one of historyвАЩs most brilliant minds.

Cast:
--------
Krishna Bharadwaj as Pandit Ramakrishna
Pankaj Berry as Rajguru Acharya Thathacharya
Manav Gohil as Sri Krishnadevaraya
Niya Sharma as Sharda
Nimisha Vakharia as Laxmi (Tenali Ramakrishna's Mother)
Sonia Sharma as Chinnadevi
Priyanka Singh as Tirumalamba
Jiten Mukhi as Mahamantri Timmarusu
Deepak Dutt Sharma as Gundappa
Sohit Vijay Soni as Mani
Sanjay manghnani as Dhani
Neha Chauhan as Varunamala

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and heвАЩs counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇ https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇ https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok вЦЇ https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

ParentвАЩs Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

#clashofclans

snippet.title: Balam Subedaar (Song): Anil Kapoor | Subedaar | GD Kaur| Balam Thanedar| Gypsy| Latest Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
Fauji Roop, Desi Swag with Gypsy Song! Presenting the latest haryanvi song вАЬBalam Subedaar (Song)вАЭ from the upcoming film Subedaar. Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik.

Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India!

Song Credits:
Singer вАУ GD Kaur
Music вАУ Rutvik Talashilkar, Shine, Raj Mawer
Lyrics вАУ YoungVeer, Rohtash Gagsiniya
Music Label вАУ T-Series

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

[Latest Haryanvi Song, New Haryanvi Song, Balam Subedaar, Balam Thanedar, Gypsy Song, GD Kaur Balam Thanedar, Mera Balam Thanedar Chalave Gypsy]

snippet.title: Franklin Touch Anything Become Diamond & King of Gold in GTA 5 in Telugu | SHINCHAN and CHOP
snippet.description:
Franklin Touch Anything Become Diamond & King of Gold in GTA 5 in Telugu | SHINCHAN and CHOP

Bhole Digital Recording Studio Presents
Our new Adivasi song вАЬBhongriyu HalavoвАЭ is inspired by the vibrant traditions, emotions, and colorful life of Adivasi culture. This song reflects the true spirit of love, celebration, and togetherness that lives in every heartbeat of our community.
This official video beautifully showcases the rich heritage, natural beauty, traditional dance, and soulful music that represent the pride and identity of Adivasi people.
LetвАЩs celebrate our culture, our identity, and our music together. вЭ§пЄПрЯФ•

Our new Adivasi song вАЬBhongriyu HalavoвАЭ is inspired by the vibrant traditions, emotions, and colorful life of Adivasi culture. This song reflects the true spirit of love, celebration, and togetherness that lives in every heartbeat of our community.
This official video beautifully showcases the rich heritage, natural beauty, traditional dance, and soulful music that represent the pride and identity of Adivasi people.
LetвАЩs celebrate our culture, our identity, and our music together. вЭ§пЄПрЯФ•

snippet.title: China а§Ђа§ња§∞ а§Ша•Ба§Єа§Њ Bharat а§Ѓа•За§В MODI а§Ха§Њ Counter Att@ck а§ѓа§Ња§¶ а§∞а§Ца•За§Ча§Њ а§Ъа•Аа§® | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain
snippet.description:
China а§Ђа§ња§∞ а§Ша•Ба§Єа§Њ Bharat а§Ѓа•За§В MODI а§Ха§Њ Counter Att@ck а§ѓа§Ња§¶ а§∞а§Ца•За§Ча§Њ а§Ъа•Аа§® | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain 

The ice is cracking in the Himalayas. It is not climate change. It is military explosives.

The global chessboard was just flipped upside down. India is no longer watching from the sidelines. It is pulling the strings.

In the last 24 hours, three massive shockwaves hit the geopolitical radar. First, India entered "Pax Silica," a massive US-led tech alliance designed to entirely cut China out of the trillion-dollar semiconductor supply chain. Second, France aggressively bypassed Washington to forge a dominant AI and quantum computing pact with New Delhi. Third, the Middle East quietly transformed the IMEC trade route into a heavily fortified security axis, tying Gulf survival directly to IndiaвАЩs rise.

But every action has a violent reaction. Beijing is panicking.
In direct retaliation to India's tech dominance, Chinese military bulldozers are blasting through the freezing Shaksgam Valley. Commercial satellites caught them red-handed building a permanent military artery aimed straight at IndiaвАЩs Siachen Glacier. A two-front collusive threat with Pakistan is rapidly becoming a geographical nightmare.

The digital cold war just triggered a physical arms race at 15,000 feet. India is responding with total, uncompromising defiance, accelerating the 1,840-kilometer Arunachal Frontier Highway.

The era of a neutral India is dead. New Delhi is now the ultimate geopolitical fortress. Dive into the undeniable satellite proof, the secret digital treaties, and the ticking countdown in the mountains.
The next 30 days will dictate the new world order.

#indiageopolitics  #chinaborder  #shaksgamvalley  #semiconductorwar  #imec  #globalstrategicshift



About:

Sumeet Jain is a leading growth specialist and geopolitical analyst with a deep focus on the economic and political landscapes of China, India, and Pakistan. He combines expertise in business and personal development with sophisticated regional geopolitical analysis, providing unique and valuable perspectives.

As a corporate trainer, mentor, and author, Jain empowers individuals and organizations to achieve their potential. His coaching programs foster growth, success, and strategic business acumen.

His analysis, delivered via his YouTube channel and written works, delves into economic trends, financial markets, and political developments. He offers insightful commentary on the interplay of these factors, shaping the future of these nations. His understanding of business analytics, coupled with keen observation of political and financial shifts, allows for nuanced perspectives. He is a recognized authority, offering practical advice and informed analysis of the intricate geopolitical dynamics.

snippet.title: Yaari  Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | Haryanvi songs Haryanavi 2026 #yaari
snippet.description:
Yaari (Official Video) Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | Haryanvi songs Haryanavi 2026 #yaari

Yaari (Official Video) Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2025 | Yaari (Official Video) Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2025

Kiara Records & Rohit Lamba Presents вАЬYaari (Official Video)" a new haryanvi songs haryanavi 2025. This haryanvi song sung by Masoom Sharma. Starring with Rohit Lamba and Vinay Yadav. Lyrics are penned by Amar Karnawal. Music is given by Pinna Music. A Film by Mohan Betaab.


Subscribe Channel :  @tecnoaadibro 

#yaariвАЛ #masoomsharmaвАЛ  #rohitlambaвАЛ #vinayyadavвАЛ #pinnamusicвАЛ #amarkarnawalвАЛ #kiararecordsвАЛ #haryanvisongвАЛ #haryanvisongsвАЛ #haryanvimusicвАЛ #newharyanvisongвАЛ #newharyanvisong2025вАЛ #haryanvisongsharyanaviвАЛ #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025вАЛ 

Lyrics -
Re Dedyu Sansa Ki Qurbani 
Du Ya Tere Pe Vaar Jawani 
Bhaiya Khatar Bhai Marjya 
Mardi Konya Yaar Janani...

Teri Khatar Naash Karange 
Dil Mei Tere Vaas Karange 
Sedhaniya Ke Baas Dharange...

Re Na Jaan Kati Dariye 
Jukar Duryodhan Ki Khatar
Ran Mei Karan Khadya Tha Adke
Nyuhi Teri Khater Khada Yaar Tera
Chinta Naa Kariye вА¶.
Saamhi Arjun Ho Ya Koi Uste bhi bada Yodha Je na Mila Khaak Mei Aaya Toh Fer Baat Kariye ..

Re Junse Chale Khilafat Mei Na Unene Bilkul Chalan Da
Agle Kare baat Maran ki 
Hum Na Baal Bhi Hallan Da
Un Ne Andaza Bhi Konya Mahara Jeen Ka Fayda Ke
Mahre Hote Haath Gerde Mahara Jeen Ka Fayda Ke ..
Re 
Unki Teere Laash Naale Mei 
Beshak Karde Fon Saale Nei
Jindgi Di Uppar Aale Nei
Jeeke Suthri Dhaal Mariye... 

Jyukar Duryodhan Ki Khatar 
Ran Mei Karan Khada Tha Aadke 
Nyue Teri Khatar Khada yaar Tera
Chinta na kariye вА¶
Re Saamhi Arjun Ho Ya Koi Uste Bhi Bada Yodha Je Na Mila Khaak Mei Aaya Mere Te Fer Baat Kariye ..

Jo Asal Mard Mei Khubi Wo Mahare Saari Pawengi 
Ghaate Mei Khoon Ho Chae Na Howe Par Khudari Pawegi..
Amar Mei Nu Toh Bojh S Thoda Par Baat Bhari Pawegi... Karnawliya Lakh Bura Par Na Gadari Pawegi
Aare Hum Issi Baat Te Chaegye Jiste Lage To Bs Lagye Humto Yaari Tod Nibhaya Gaye Tu Bi Baat Te Na Firye

Jyukar Duryodhan Ki Khatar 
Ran Mei Karan Khada Tha Aadke 
Nyue Teri Khatar Khada yaar Tera
Chinta na kariye
Re Saamhi Arjun Ho Ya Koi Uste Bhi Bada Yodha Je Na Mila Khaak Mei Aaya Mere Te Fer Baat Kariye

snippet.title: New Adivasi Song | Gulalya Haat | Bhongriya Song | Sanjay Kirade & Mahi Dawar | AVP  #adivasisong
snippet.description:
а§Іа§®-а§Іа§® а§Єа§§а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а•§ а§Ьа§ѓ а§Ьа•Ла§єа§Ња§∞ а§Ьа§ѓ а§Жа§¶а§ња§µа§Ња§Єа•А
Adivasi VDO Production Presents

Gulalya Haat is inspired by the vibrant Adivasi Bhangoriya Haat, where people come together to celebrate life with music, dance, colors, and joyful gatherings.
This official video beautifully captures the happiness, togetherness, and festive spirit of the traditional haat, showcasing the true essence of Adivasi culture.

рЯОђ Song Title
New Adivasi Song | Gulalya Haat | Bhongriya Song | Sanjay Kirade & Mahi Dawar | AVP  #adivasisong

рЯО• Production Team

вЮ§ Producer: Mukesh Solanki
вЮ§ Director: Rohit Vaishaki (Aadiwood)
вЮ§ Choreographer: Mayur Singh Chouhan & karan solanki
вЮ§ Script Writer: Arjoon Solanki, Rohit Vaishaki, Anjay Barde

рЯМЯ Featuring Artists
-Dora Dawar
-Gulatya,Vinzaa, 
-Mayur Chouhan, Priya Solanki, 
-Rupa Solanki, Ramasingh Bamane (Bahu), 
-Aruna Solanki, Ravindra Singh,
-Agesh Solanki 
- priyanka , kajal , Roshani ,

вЮ§ Dhol Rhythm : DJ Arun More

Adivasi VDO Production Presents

Gulalya Haat is inspired by the vibrant Adivasi Bhangoriya Haat, where people come together to celebrate life with music, dance, colors, and joyful gatherings.
This official video beautifully captures the happiness, togetherness, and festive spirit of the traditional haat, showcasing the true essence of Adivasi culture.

snippet.title: Jignesh Barot | Laganiyo (Official Video) | а™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™ѓаЂЛ | New Gujarati Song 2026
snippet.description:
вАЬа™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™ѓаЂЛвАЭ а™Па™Х а™ЄаЂБа™Ва™¶а™∞ а™Еа™®аЂЗ а™¶а™ња™≤а™®аЂЗ а™ЄаЂНа™™а™∞аЂНа™ґаЂА а™Ьа™Ња™ѓ а™Па™µаЂБа™В а™ЧаЂАа™§ а™ЫаЂЗ, а™ЬаЂЗа™Ѓа™Ња™В Jignesh Barot а™®аЂА а™ЃаЂАа™†аЂА а™Еа™µа™Ња™Ь а™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™Уа™®аЂЗ а™ЬаЂАа™µа™Ва™§ а™ђа™®а™Ња™µаЂЗ а™ЫаЂЗа•§ а™Ѓа™Ња™§аЂНа™∞ @SaregamaGujarati  а™™а™∞ а™Єа™Ња™Ва™≠а™≥аЂЛа•§

Credits:

Singer: Jignesh Barot
Producer: Red Velvet Cinema
Lyrics : Naresh Thakor Vayad
Music : Jackie Gajjar
Artist : Jignesh Barot ,Chhaya Thakor 
Co Artis: Bharti Chaudhari,Hashmukh Limbachiya 
Creative Producer: Dhyey Films & Team
Concept Director: Vishnu Thakor (Adalaj)
Cemera :Montu Rajput

Technical Support: Jenish Talaviya

Sound: Sunil Kachhiya

Recording: Sargam Music Studio Patan ( Pankaj Mistry) 
Special Thanx : J D Bapu

Lyrics:

а™У а™µа™ња™Іа™Ња™§а™Њ а™∞аЂБа™†аЂА а™®аЂЗ а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™¶аЂБа™≠а™Ња™£аЂА а™ЄаЂЗ а™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂА(аЂ®)
а™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™ѓаЂЛ а™ХаЂЗа™Ѓ а™Ха™∞аЂА а™µа™ња™єа™∞а™ЄаЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ 
а™єаЂЛ а™ЬаЂЛа™°аЂЗ а™∞а™єаЂЗа™µа™Ња™®аЂА а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™єа™§аЂА а™Па™Х а™Ѓа™Ња™Ча™£аЂА 
а™Ѓа™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™ѓаЂЛ а™ХаЂЗа™Ѓ а™Ха™∞аЂА а™µа™ња™єа™∞а™ЄаЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ 
а™У а™¶аЂБа™Га™Ц а™≠а™∞аЂА а™µаЂЗа™¶а™®а™Њ а™®аЂА а™Ха™∞аЂБа™В а™ХаЂЛа™®аЂЗ а™Ѓа™Ња™Ча™£аЂА 
а™µа™Ња™≤а™≠а™∞аЂА а™µа™Ња™§аЂЛ а™ХаЂЛа™£ а™Ха™∞а™ЄаЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ 
а™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™ѓаЂЛ а™ХаЂЗа™Ѓ а™Ха™∞аЂА а™µа™ња™єа™∞а™ЄаЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ 
а™У а™ЬаЂЛа™µа™Њ а™Ѓа™Ња™ЧаЂБа™В а™µа™≤а™Ца™Њ а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂБа™В а™ЧаЂЛа™∞а™≤ а™Ха™ѓа™Њ а™¶аЂЗа™Ца™Ња™ѓ а™ЫаЂЗ 
а™™а™Ча™®аЂА а™Ьа™Ња™Ьа™∞ а™Ца™Ца™°а™Ња™µаЂЗ а™≠а™£а™Ха™Ња™∞ а™Па™µа™Њ а™•а™Ња™ѓ а™ЫаЂЗ 
а™У а™Ѓа™Ња™ѓа™Њ а™≤а™Ча™Ња™°аЂА а™ЃаЂЗа™≤аЂА а™¶аЂАа™ІаЂЛ а™Ѓа™®а™°аЂБа™В а™∞аЂЗ а™ЃаЂБа™Ьа™Ња™ѓ а™ЫаЂЗ 
а™ЬаЂАа™µа™® а™®аЂЗ а™ЃаЂЛа™§ а™µа™ЪаЂНа™ЪаЂЗ а™ЬаЂАа™µ а™ЬаЂЛа™≤а™Њ а™Ца™Ња™ѓ а™ЫаЂЗ 
а™У а™µа™Ња™§ а™Ха™∞аЂА а™µа™єа™Ња™≤аЂА а™µа™∞а™Єа™§аЂА а™∞аЂЗ а™µа™Ња™Ва™¶а™°аЂА 
а™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™ѓаЂЛ а™ХаЂЗа™Ѓ а™Ха™∞аЂА а™µа™ња™єа™∞а™ЄаЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ (аЂ®)
а™У а™Ѓа™Ња™∞а™Њ а™™аЂНа™∞аЂЗа™Ѓ а™®аЂЗ а™™аЂВа™Ьа™§аЂАа™§аЂА а™™аЂНа™∞аЂЗа™Ѓ а™™а™Ња™Ыа™≥ а™єа™§аЂА а™ШаЂЗа™≤аЂА 
а™Ѓа™Ња™∞а™Њ а™єа™Ња™• а™Ѓа™Ња™В а™®а™Њ а™∞а™єаЂА а™Ѓа™Ња™∞а™Њ а™єа™Ња™•аЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ а™Єа™Ња™Ъа™µаЂЗа™≤аЂА 
а™У а™ЬаЂАа™µ а™Ха™єаЂА а™ђаЂЛа™≤а™Ња™µа™§аЂА а™Жа™ЬаЂЗ а™ЬаЂАа™µ а™•а™ѓаЂЛ а™¶аЂВа™∞ 
а™Па™Ха™≤аЂЛ а™™а™Ња™°а™ња™ѓаЂЛ а™Жа™ЬаЂЗ а™єаЂБа™В а™§аЂЛ а™•а™И а™Ча™ѓаЂЛ а™Ча™Ња™Ва™°аЂЛа™§аЂБа™∞ а™∞аЂЗ 
а™У а™Ьа™∞аЂВа™∞ а™єа™§аЂА а™ЬаЂЗа™®аЂА а™®а™•аЂА а™Па™®аЂА а™єа™Ња™Ьа™∞аЂА 
а™єа™Ња™Ьа™∞а™ња™ѓаЂЛ а™ХаЂЛа™£ а™™аЂВа™∞аЂА а™Ха™∞а™ЄаЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ 
а™≤а™Ња™Ча™£аЂАа™ѓаЂЛ а™ХаЂЗа™Ѓ а™Ха™∞аЂА а™µа™ња™єа™∞а™ЄаЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ
